name: Ingleside Open Back Upholstered Wood Frame Dining Chair - Threshold™
description:
Elevate the ambiance of your dining area with the Ingleside Open-Back Upholstered Wood-Frame Dining Chair from Threshold™. This upholstered armchair is constructed from a dark-brown hardwood with a padded seat and backrest finished with rounded corners, along with a cut-out design at the back to create a clean, airy silhouette. Perfect for adding a touch of modern style and luxury to your dining room, this dining chair is wrapped in a textured gray upholstery, which contrasts beautifully with the dark-brown frame for an eye-catching look — it can also be used for additional impromptu seating anywhere in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
